## Screenshots / GIFs (UI changes only)

<!-- Drop screenshots of the new UI in light + dark + mobile + desktop.
     For interaction changes, a short GIF beats a static image. -->

## Test plan

<!-- Bulleted list of what reviewer should verify. -->

- [ ] `npm run check` clean
- [ ] `npm run lint` clean
- [ ] `npm run test` clean
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` clean
- [ ] Manual: tested on chrome + firefox + safari (desktop + mobile)
- [ ] Manual: light + dark theme both look correct
- [ ] Manual: a11y — keyboard navigation + screen reader sanity

## A11y

<!-- For UI changes — confirm: -->

- [ ] All interactive elements reachable by keyboard
- [ ] All inputs have labels (visible or `sr-only`)
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA (4.5:1 normal, 3:1 large)
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected for any new animation
- [ ] Focus state visible on every interactive element

## Performance impact

<!-- Bundle size? Render perf? Network? Acceptable / measured / NA. -->

<!-- Any API / contract / schema breakage? Migration plan? -->
